node_1: binary occupancy grids o with a resolution of 32 × 32 × 32
bounding box b for each p
deformable and rigid dragging of object elements
effectiveness and controllability of user interactions
needed part set or selected at early stage of generation
interested region q defined by a center o and radius r
traditional geometry transformations t such as rotation, translation, and stretching can be applied to the part p and then it is concatenated with the unchanged set.

deformable dragging regards the local structure as a plasticine and aims to deform the geometry smoothly, while the rigid dragging treats the local region as a rigid part and forces the local structure unchanged.
